Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena Duces Tecum; Declaration And Separate Statement In Support
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Pam Kong, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Jose Fuentes
No appearance stated by the defendant

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiffs Jose Funtes, Cynthia Eastin-Neary, Christopher Cieslla, Jody Ebert, Catterina Tasso, Bryon Waibel's Motion To Quash Subpoena Duces Tecum is granted. The subpoena is overly broad and intrudes into Plaintiff's right to privacy without good cause. Counsel must meet and confer to properly limit any future subpoena. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
